import os
import click


@click.command()
@click.option("--user-id", required=True)
def fetch_user(user_id):
    api_key = os.environ.get("API_KEY")
    base_url = os.environ.get("API_BASE_URL", "https://api.example.com")
    timeout = int(os.environ.get("API_TIMEOUT", "30"))
    click.echo(f"Fetching {user_id} from {base_url}")


@click.command()
@click.option("--filename", required=True)
def upload(filename):
    s3_bucket = os.environ.get("S3_BUCKET")
    aws_region = os.environ.get("AWS_REGION", "us-east-1")
    max_size = int(os.environ.get("MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE", "10485760"))
    click.echo(f"Uploading {filename} to {s3_bucket} in {aws_region}")


@click.command()
def report():
    db_host = os.environ.get("DB_HOST")
    db_port = os.environ.get("DB_PORT", "5432")
    db_name = os.environ.get("DB_NAME")
    output_format = os.environ.get("REPORT_FORMAT", "pdf")
    click.echo(f"Generating {output_format} report from {db_host}:{db_port}/{db_name}")
